series_metadata.series_description: The Bureau of Program Integrity (BPI) may either conduct an audit or monitor and review audits performed on behalf of the department. The purpose of all Medicaid audits to ensure payments made were reasonable and necessary, and that applicable laws, regulations and contractual agreements were followed.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until audit has been released, then store in designated ODM records center for 7 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office until audit has been released, then store in designated ODM records center for 7 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
